query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: India ramps up share sale plans to cushion budget hit from oil
articles.description: India accelerates stake sales in major state-owned firms to stabilize finances impacted by high oil prices.

articles.title: Foreign inflows, lower oil prices help Indian bond traders look past US Treasury selloff
articles.description: Indian bonds rise as foreign inflows and lower oil prices offset U.S. Treasury selloff, boosting investor confidence.

articles.title: Rupee Rises 26 Paise to 94.90 Against US Dollar
articles.description: Lower crude oil prices and strong foreign bond inflows support the domestic currency in early trade.

articles.title: India's EV Surge Could Slash Crude Oil Bills by Rs 1 Lakh Crore by 2030
articles.description: India is poised to replace 35 lakh petrol vehicles with electric vehicles between 2027-2030, potentially saving nearly Rs 1 lakh crore in crude oil imports by 2030. Enhanced EV adoption, driven by geopolitical factors, is accelerating, necessitating expanded charging infrastructure and comprehensive regulatory frameworks.

articles.title: Oil prices fall to pre-war levels as Strait of Hormuz shipping slowly recovers
articles.description: Tanker traffic through Hormuz has begun to recover, though vessel movements remain well below pre-conflict levels

articles.title: Rs 1 lakh crore on crude imports will be saved by 2030, as 35 lakh EVs will replace petrol vehicles: SBI Report
articles.description: Around 35 lakh more electric vehicles (EVs) are expected to replace petrol vehicles during 2027-2030, helping India save nearly Rs 1 lakh crore in crude oil import bills if EVs account for 20 per cent of the vehicle market by 2030, according to a report by the State Bank of India (SBI).

articles.title: BPCL, HPCL, IOC shares gain up to 4% amid oil price fall, Nayara petrol, diesel rate cuts
articles.description: HPCL gained the most, rising 3.58 per cent to Rs 392.20 apiece. BPCL rose 3.33 per cent to hit a high of Rs 314.35 on BSE. IOC added 2.75 per cent to Rs 143.75.

articles.title: Trump Chief Says There Are ‘Guys Living In Caves’ Responsible For Strait Of Hormuz Debacle
articles.description: The crucial waterway closed earlier this year thanks to the Iran war, sending oil prices to skyrocket worldwide.

articles.title: Fed can afford to stay patient as inflation risks ease: Steve Englander
articles.description: The Federal Reserve is unlikely to alter interest rates soon, as inflation moderates and the economy remains stable, according to Steve Englander of Standard Chartered. He believes muted labor costs and easing oil prices reduce the need for immediate policy shifts.

articles.title: Fed can afford to stay patient as inflation risks ease: Steve Englander
articles.description: The Federal Reserve is unlikely to alter interest rates soon, as inflation moderates and the economy remains stable, according to Steve Englander of Standard Chartered. He believes muted labor costs and easing oil prices reduce the need for immediate policy shifts.
